471:
"Warrior of Darkness, servant of death,
take care of our souls at our dying breath...

"Warrior of Darkness, servant of death,
take care of our souls at our dying breath...

472:
“Let sinners and eaters of sin go with thee,
That all may return to the sunless sea.”

“Let sinners and eaters of sin go with thee,
That all may return to the sunless sea.”
